entities.name: Thomas
entities.description: The apostle Thomas, used as a biblical example to discuss the nature of spirits and physical presence.

entities.name: Samuel
entities.description: A biblical figure, the subject of a debate regarding whether he was truly raised from the dead by the witch of Endor.

entities.name: Christ
entities.description: A central figure in the Christian context, used to discuss the nature of spirits and physical bodies.

entities.name: Eusebius
entities.description: An ecclesiastical historian whose work is cited to discuss the oracle of Apollo and the deception of priests.

entities.name: Gregory of Nazianzus (Gregorie Neocessariensis)
entities.description: A figure whose journey to the Alps and interaction with the temple of' Apollo is used as a tale of deception.

entities.name: Aristotle
entities.description: A philosopher cited to provide a rational critique of reports of speaking beasts and moving images.

entities.name: Agrippa
entities.description: An author cited regarding the ability of necromancers to recall spirits within a year of death.

entities.name: Saul (King Saul)
entities.description: A biblical king whose interaction with the witch of Endor is a central case study in the text.

entities.name: the witch of Endor
entities.description: A woman accused of raising Samuel through a familiar spirit.

entities.name: the devil
entities.description: A spirit mentioned in various contexts, including the letter to the devil and the debate over whether a spirit was raised.

entities.name: the Pythonists
entities.description: A group or tradition associated with the oracle of Apollo, characterized by their use of deception and oracular practices.

entities.name: the creation, transformation, transportation, and transubstantiation of witches
entities.description: A set of magical or supernatural phenomena attributed to witches.

entities.name: the witch of Endor
entities.description: A woman accused of raising Samuel from the dead via a familiar spirit.

entities.name: the witch of Endor
entities.description: A woman accused of raising Samuel from the dead via a familiar_spirit.
